requirement_topic.en: BSTI Mandatory Certification — Imported Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: BSTI强制认证——进口空调器与热泵
requirement_topic.zht: BSTI強制認證——進口空調器與熱泵

summary.en: The Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI) administers mandatory product certification for listed electrical goods including imported air conditioners and heat pumps. Products must carry the BSTI mark before sale or importation for domestic use. BSTI certification requires conformity to applicable BDS standards (which adopt IEC frameworks), a BSTI pre-shipment inspection or import certificate for listed goods, and factory or batch testing documentation. The Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Ordinance 1985 and subsequent rules establish the mandatory certification regime. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is not recognised by BSTI and does not substitute the BSTI mark.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国标准与检验局（BSTI）对列管电气产品（包括进口空调器和热泵）实施强制产品认证。产品在国内销售或进口前必须取得BSTI标志。BSTI认证须符合相关BDS标准（采用IEC框架）、获得列管商品的BSTI装船前检验或进口证书，并提供工厂或批次检测文件。1985年《孟加拉国标准与检验机构条例》及后续规定确立了强制认证制度。CCC（中国强制认证）不受BSTI认可，不能替代BSTI标志。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國標準與檢驗局（BSTI）對列管電氣產品（包括進口空調器和熱泵）實施強制產品認證。產品在國內銷售或進口前必須取得BSTI標誌。BSTI認證須符合相關BDS標準（採用IEC框架）、獲得列管商品的BSTI裝船前檢驗或進口證書，並提供工廠或批次檢測文件。1985年《孟加拉國標準與檢驗機構條例》及後續規定確立了強制認證制度。CCC（中國強制認證）不受BSTI認可，不能替代BSTI標誌。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Ordinance 1985
BSTI mandatory certification scheme for electrical goods
BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 (heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers)
BSTI pre-shipment inspection / import certificate requirement for listed goods

summary.en: China operates the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) regime for heat pumps and air conditioners, including testing to GB 4706.32 for safety and GB/T 7725 for performance. CCC certificates and Chinese test reports constitute domestic-market evidence only and are not accepted by BSTI as Bangladesh certification evidence.
summary.zh: 中国对热泵和空调器实施CCC（中国强制认证）制度，包括按GB 4706.32进行安全测试、按GB/T 7725进行性能测试。CCC证书和中国检测报告仅为国内市场证据，BSTI不接受其作为孟加拉国认证证据。
summary.zht: 中國對熱泵和空調器實施CCC（中國強制認證）制度，包括按GB 4706.32進行安全測試、按GB/T 7725進行性能測試。CCC證書和中國檢測報告僅為國內市場證據，BSTI不接受其作為孟加拉國認證證據。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute BSTI mandatory certification. Chinese exporters must engage a BSTI-recognised route for product conformity to BDS/IEC 60335-2-40, arrange BSTI pre-shipment inspection or an import certificate, and ensure the BSTI mark is affixed before importation. Existing CCC test reports may support but cannot replace BSTI-required documentation. Importers and exporters should confirm the current BSTI mandatory product list and applicable BDS standard edition before shipment.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代BSTI强制认证。中国出口商须通过BSTI认可的途径确认产品符合BDS/IEC 60335-2-40，安排BSTI装船前检验或进口证书，并确保在进口前加贴BSTI标志。现有CCC检测报告可作为支持材料，但不能替代BSTI要求的文件。进口商和出口商在出货前应确认当前BSTI强制产品目录和适用BDS标准版本。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代BSTI強制認證。中國出口商須通過BSTI認可的途徑確認產品符合BDS/IEC 60335-2-40，安排BSTI裝船前檢驗或進口證書，並確保在進口前加貼BSTI標誌。現有CCC檢測報告可作為支持材料，但不能替代BSTI要求的文件。進口商和出口商在出貨前應確認當前BSTI強制產品目錄和適用BDS標準版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BSTI mark and pre-shipment inspection or import certificate required for listed electrical goods including imported air conditioners and heat pumps
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market products under CCC; not recognised by BSTI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — BSTI mandatory certification and pre-shipment inspection are required for imported air conditioners and heat pumps; CCC evidence is not accepted and a separate BSTI compliance route must be arranged before importation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——进口空调器和热泵须取得BSTI强制认证及装船前检验；CCC证据不予受理，须在进口前另行安排BSTI合规途径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——進口空調器和熱泵須取得BSTI強制認證及裝船前檢驗；CCC證據不予受理，須在進口前另行安排BSTI合規途徑。
